title: Isolation of Matrix Metalloproteinases (MMP)-expressing cells from Stromal Vascular Fraction
author: Aoi Satoh
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.p59dq96
materials: Weight Collagenase D (f.c. 1.5 U/ml) and Dispase II (f.c. 2.4 U/ml) in 50 ml tube. %s %s Collagenase D %s %s 7.5 U/tissue %s %s Dispase II %s %s 12 U/tissue %s %s Collagenase D Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #11088866001 Dispase II (neutral protease, grade II) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #4942078001
Mince with scissors until approximately 1 mm pieace

Stop digestion by adding 5 ml of 0.5 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution). Bovine Serum Albumin solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A1595-50ML autoMACS Rinsing Solution Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-091-222
Proceed to sort by BD FACSAria II.

steps.title: Prepare digestion buffer 10 ml / tissue / 2~5 mice
steps.instruction: Prepare digestion buffer 10 ml / tissue / 2~5 mice.

steps.title: Add appropriate amount of PBS to dissolve
steps.instruction: Add appropriate amount of PBS to dissolve. Sacrifice mice before dissolving. PBS Contributed by users

steps.title: Shake in water bath at 37 ℃
steps.instruction: Shake in water bath at 37 ℃. Undetermined, less than 10 min

steps.title: Sacrifice mice and take out adipose...
steps.instruction: Sacrifice mice and take out adipose tissue, place on sterile 10 cm dish with PBS at room temperature (RT).

steps.title: Activate digestion buffer by adding CaCl2 (f
steps.instruction: Activate digestion buffer by adding CaCl2 (f.c. 10 mM). Calcium chloride solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #21115-100ML

steps.title: Remove residual PBS from the tissues by patting on Kimwipe
steps.instruction: Remove residual PBS from the tissues by patting on Kimwipe.

steps.title: Add 2 ml of activated digestion...
steps.instruction: Add 2 ml of activated digestion buffer to tissue in 10 cm dish.

steps.title: Transfer to 50 ml tube by pipette
steps.instruction: Transfer to 50 ml tube by pipette.

steps.title: Shake in water bath at 37...
steps.instruction: Shake in water bath at 37 ℃ for 1 hour (gently shake by hand every 10 min). Undetermined 01:00:00 00:10:00, x6

steps.title: Spin 300 g for 5 min at room temperature (RT)
steps.instruction: Spin 300 g for 5 min at room temperature (RT).

steps.title: Remove the sup
steps.instruction: Remove the sup.

steps.title: Suspend the pellet with 1 ml 0
steps.instruction: Suspend the pellet with 1 ml 0.5 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution).

steps.title: Place a cell strainer (100 μm...
steps.instruction: Place a cell strainer (100 μm diameter) over a new 50 ml tube and filter the cell suspension. Corning® 100µm Cell Strainer Corning Catalog #431752

steps.title: Repeat step 13-16 with 40 μm diameter cell strainer
steps.instruction: Repeat step 13-16 with 40 μm diameter cell strainer. go to step #13 Corning® 40µm Cell Strainer Corning Catalog #431750

steps.title: Spin 300 g for 5 min at RT
steps.instruction: Spin 300 g for 5 min at RT.

steps.title: Suspend the pellet with cold (4 ℃) 80μl of 0
steps.instruction: Suspend the pellet with cold (4 ℃) 80μl of 0.5 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution). From this step use cold (4 ℃) buffer. Undetermined

steps.title: Add 20 μl (mix by gentle...
steps.instruction: Add 20 μl (mix by gentle pipetting) of Non-Adipocyte Progenitor Depletion Cocktail, mouse. Adipose Tissue Progenitor Isolation Kit, mouse Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-106-639

steps.title: Mix well and incubate for 15...
steps.instruction: Mix well and incubate for 15 min at 4 ℃ (protected from light). 00:15:00

steps.title: During the incubation, place LS Column...
steps.instruction: During the incubation, place LS Column in the magnetic field of a MACS Separator and 15 ml tube under LS Column. MACS MultiStand Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-042-303 QuadroMACS Separator Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-090-976 MACS 15 mL Tube Rack Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-091-052 LS Columns Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-042-401

steps.title: Prime column by adding 3 ml of 0
steps.instruction: Prime column by adding 3 ml of 0.5 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution). Avoid air bubbles, bubbles could block the column. Always wait until the column reservoir is empty before proceeding to the next step.

steps.title: After 15 min incubation, add 400 ul of 0
steps.instruction: After 15 min incubation, add 400 ul of 0.5 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution) and apply onto the column. Collect flow-through containing Lin- cells.

steps.title: Wash column with 1 ml of 0
steps.instruction: Wash column with 1 ml of 0.5 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution) 2 times. Collect flow-through containing Lin- cells.

steps.title: Spin 300 g for 5 min at RT
steps.instruction: Spin 300 g for 5 min at RT.

steps.title: Remove the supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant.

steps.title: Suspend cells in 100 ul of...
steps.instruction: Suspend cells in 100 ul of 1 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution).

steps.title: Add 2 ul of TruStain fcX Ab
steps.instruction: Add 2 ul of TruStain fcX Ab. (0.5 mg/ml) and mix. TruStain fcX™ (anti-mouse CD16/32) Antibody BioLegend Catalog #101319

steps.title: Incubate 10 min on ice (Protect from light)
steps.instruction: Incubate 10 min on ice (Protect from light). 00:10:00

steps.title: Add 900 ul of 1 %...
steps.instruction: Add 900 ul of 1 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution) and mix.

steps.title: Spin 300 g for 5 min in 4 ℃
steps.instruction: Spin 300 g for 5 min in 4 ℃.

steps.title: Remove the supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 100 ul of Click-iT fixative...
steps.instruction: Add 100 ul of Click-iT fixative (4 % paraformaldehyde in PBS) and mix. 4% paraformaldehyde/1XPBS solution Contributed by users

steps.title: Incubate 15 min RT (Protect from light)
steps.instruction: Incubate 15 min RT (Protect from light). 00:15:00

steps.title: Add 900 ul of 1 %...
steps.instruction: Add 900 ul of 1 % BSA in PBS + EDTA (autoMACS Rinsing Solution) and mix.

steps.title: Spin 300 g for 5 min RT
steps.instruction: Spin 300 g for 5 min RT. Prepare permeabilization buffer (0.3 % Triton X-100 Dilute in 'RT (25℃)' 1 % BSA in PBS + EDTA)

steps.title: Remove the supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 100 ul of permeabilization buffer and mix
steps.instruction: Add 100 ul of permeabilization buffer and mix.

steps.title: Incubate 15 min RT (Protected from light)
steps.instruction: Incubate 15 min RT (Protected from light). 00:15:00

steps.title: Add labeled Mmp3 Ab
steps.instruction: Add labeled Mmp3 Ab. (1:200) and mix. MMP3 Monoclonal Antibody (4F10) Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #MA5-17123

steps.title: Incubate 10 min on ice (Protected from light)
steps.instruction: Incubate 10 min on ice (Protected from light). 00:10:00

steps.title: Add 900 ul of permeabilization buffer and mix
steps.instruction: Add 900 ul of permeabilization buffer and mix.

steps.title: Spin 300 g for 5 min 4 ℃
steps.instruction: Spin 300 g for 5 min 4 ℃.

steps.title: Remove the supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant.

steps.title: Suspend in 500 ul of permeabilization...
steps.instruction: Suspend in 500 ul of permeabilization buffer and load on 5 ml Polystyrene Round-Bottom Tube with Cell-strainer Cap. Falcon® 5 mL Round Bottom Polystyrene Test Tube, with Cell Strainer Snap Cap Corning Catalog #352235
